brand_identity.name: Syroce
brand_identity.mission: To be the operating system for modern travel agencies, replacing chaos with clarity.

buttons.primary: rounded-full px-8 py-6 text-lg font-semibold shadow-lg hover:shadow-blue-500/25 transition-all duration-300
buttons.secondary: rounded-full px-8 py-6 text-lg font-medium bg-white border border-slate-200 text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-50 transition-all duration-300
buttons.ghost: text-slate-600 hover:text-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-50 rounded-lg px-4 py-2

cards.feature: bg-white rounded-2xl p-8 border border-slate-100 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300 group
cards.pricing: bg-white rounded-3xl p-8 border border-slate-200 shadow-sm relative overflow-hidden
cards.pricing_featured: bg-slate-900 text-white rounded-3xl p-8 shadow-2xl scale-105 border-none relative overflow-hidden

inputs.default: h-12 rounded-lg border-slate-200 bg-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500/20 focus:border-blue-500 transition-all

hero.description: Asymmetrical layout. Left: Heavy typography, dual CTA. Right: Floating 'Glass' Dashboard Mockup with tilt effect.
hero.background: Radial gradient from top-right (blue/5) to bottom-left (transparent).

trust_bar.description: Clean row of metrics. No logos. Use large numbers with descriptive labels below.

problem_solution.description: Interactive 'Toggle' component. Toggle between 'The Old Way (Excel/Chaos)' and 'The Syroce Way (Unified)'.

features_bento.description: Bento grid layout for key features. Mix of 1x1, 2x1, and 2x2 cells.
features_bento.style: Gap-6. Cards with icon on top-left, text bottom-left.

pricing.description: 3 cards. 'Pro' plan highlighted with dark background and 'Most Popular' badge.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. UPDATE CSS VARIABLES: Override the --primary variable in index.css to '221 83% 53%' (HSL for #2563EB) immediately.
2. USE LUCIDE ICONS: Use lucide-react for all icons. Suggested: Globe, Shield, Users, BarChart3, Calendar, CreditCard, Layers.
3. MOBILE FIRST: Ensure the dashboard mockups in the Hero section stack vertically or disappear gracefully on mobile.
4. DATA-TESTID: Every button, input, and link MUST have a data-testid attribute (e.g., 'hero-cta-trial', 'pricing-plan-pro').
5. NO REAL IMAGES FOR UI: Build the dashboard preview using HTML/CSS/Tailwind primitives (borders, shadows, rounded divs) to look like a UI. Do not use screenshots.
6. LANGUAGE: The content MUST be in Turkish as per the problem statement.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: - Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
- Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
- Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
- Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
- You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: `transition: all`. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
- You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add `.App { text-align: center; }` in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
- Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
- NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭 etc for icons.
- Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
- Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
- Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
- Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
- Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
- Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
- Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones
- Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
- Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
